templates.name: Agenda
templates.desc: Your calendar, projected from the vault.

templates.name: Tasks
templates.desc: A Things-style task manager over your vault's canonical tasks.

templates.name: People
templates.desc: Your circle, remembered — a personal CRM that keeps light records on the people you care about and nudges you to stay in touch.

templates.name: Notes
templates.desc: Write, file and pin notes over your vault's canonical content.

templates.name: Photos
templates.desc: The library you own, wherever the bytes live.

templates.name: Docs
templates.desc: A drive for your important documents — filed, downloadable, restorable.

templates.name: Locker
templates.desc: Everything, locked up — a password manager for logins, cards, notes and secrets, with Watchtower and a generator.

templates.name: Tally
templates.desc: Split, settled — track shared expenses across groups and friends, see who owes whom, and settle up.

templates.name: Photo captions
templates.desc: Captions and tags new photos so the library is searchable by what's in the pictures.

templates.name: Document text
templates.desc: OCRs scanned documents into searchable text and writes a one-paragraph summary for each.

templates.name: Screenshot intelligence
templates.desc: Turns photographed receipts and bookings into staged ledger and calendar entries you review.

templates.name: Document filing
templates.desc: Proposes a folder and a readable title for every scan-dump document — you approve, it files.

templates.name: Face proposals
templates.desc: Spots faces in new photos and proposes regions you confirm as people — nothing is asserted without you.

templates.name: Trip albums
templates.desc: Clusters your photos into trip albums by time gaps — proposed as drafts, published only when you approve.

templates.name: Document links
templates.desc: Links documents to the people they mention, anchored to the exact passage — your CRM timeline grows documents.

templates.name: Document deadlines
templates.desc: Finds expiry and renewal dates inside your documents and stages them as calendar entries — your documents watch your deadlines.

templates.name: Renewal reminders
templates.desc: Watches published deadlines and briefs you when one is inside two weeks.
templates.triggerLabel: When a deadline is 14 days out

templates.name: Gmail sync
templates.desc: Your Gmail flows into the vault as messages — read-only, incremental, through your own Google OAuth client.

templates.name: Gmail send
templates.desc: Released email drafts leave through the outbox — each send is a reviewable artifact you approve, performed by the gateway through your own Google OAuth client.
templates.triggerLabel: When you release an email draft

templates.name: Calendar invite send
templates.desc: Agenda's needs-action guests leave through the outbox as ICS invites — each send is a reviewable artifact you approve, performed by the gateway through your own Google OAuth client.
templates.triggerLabel: When you invite someone to an event

templates.name: Google Calendar sync
templates.desc: Your Google Calendar lands in the vault as events — read-only, incremental via sync tokens.

templates.name: Google Contacts sync
templates.desc: Your Google Contacts become people in the vault — merge-aware, read-only, incremental.

templates.name: GitHub sync
templates.desc: Issues and PRs you're involved in flow into the vault as threads — read-only, via a fine-grained PAT.

templates.name: Release notes drafter
templates.desc: Drafts user-facing release notes the moment a pull request merges into main.

templates.name: Google Drive sync
templates.desc: Recent Drive files land in the vault as reviewable messages — metadata and links, read-only.

templates.name: Outlook Mail sync
templates.desc: Outlook / Microsoft 365 mail flows into the vault as messages — read-only via Graph.

templates.name: Outlook Calendar sync
templates.desc: Outlook / Microsoft 365 calendar events land in Agenda — read-only via Graph.

templates.name: Outlook Contacts sync
templates.desc: Outlook contacts become people in the vault — merge-aware, read-only.

templates.name: OneDrive sync
templates.desc: Recent OneDrive files land as reviewable messages — metadata and links.

templates.name: GitLab sync
templates.desc: Issues and merge requests you are involved in flow into the vault as threads.

templates.name: Linear sync
templates.desc: Assigned and created Linear issues land in the vault as threads.

templates.name: Notion sync
templates.desc: Pages shared with your Notion integration land as searchable messages.

templates.name: Todoist sync
templates.desc: Active Todoist tasks land in the vault as reviewable threads (until native task staging ships).

templates.name: Slack sync
templates.desc: Recent Slack DMs and channel mentions land as vault threads.

templates.name: Dropbox sync
templates.desc: Recent Dropbox files land as reviewable messages — metadata and paths.
